creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Building in a poudriere ia64 jail at r262690.
The ports tree is at r347001.

The error:

H5Ztrans.c:1539: warning: will never be executed
  CCLD     libhdf5.la
/usr/local/lib/gcc46/libgcc_s.so: could not read symbols: File in wrong format
*** Error code 1

The full build log:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/logs/hdf5-18-1.8.10.log
